title: Spicy Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe with a spicy kick.

ingredients.name: Chewy noodles
ingredients.notes: such as rice noodles or udon

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated carrot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the spicy stir-fry sauce and sugar.
Add the chewy noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
